description: Genspark is an AI workspace with products for slides, documents, spreadsheets, coding, design, and other agent-driven tasks. Its help center describes a multi-product AI platform with integrations through an MCP store and connected tools.
summary: genspark.ai exposes a known OAuth-protected MCP server for Genspark AI Slides; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on the domain during discovery.
